name: nestjs-crud-generator
description: TypeORM entity to NestJS DTOs, service, and controller with diff-before-write; optional @nestjs/swagger and AST module registration (Mongo or SQL).

commands.title: Generate CRUD (quick, saved or last custom options)
Open or browse generated code examples

walkthroughs.title: NestJS CRUD Generator
walkthroughs.description: Scaffold service, controller, and DTOs from a TypeORM entity with a guided options dialog and optional undo.

steps.title: Layout and how to start
steps.description:
1. In your Nest app, use a feature folder: `my-feature.module.ts`, `entities/*.entity.ts` next to it.
2. Open a **`.ts` entity** in the editor (not `.tsx` — entities are TypeScript only).
3. Use **CodeLens** on the `@Entity` line, **Ctrl+.** / the **lightbulb** (Quick Fix) anywhere in the file, **Ctrl+Shift+P** → **Generate CRUD from entity**, the **editor title** action, or the context menu.
4. A **step-by-step options** flow appears (data source, routes, Swagger, etc.).
5. **Undo last CRUD generation** reverts the last run once (files + module).

[Open this walkthrough again](command:nestjs-crud-generator.openWalkthrough) · [README](command:nestjs-crud-generator.openReadme) · [Generate](command:nestjs-crud-generator.generateCRUD) · [Quick generate](command:nestjs-crud-generator.generateCRUDQuick) · [Output log](command:nestjs-crud-generator.openOutputLog)

steps.title: Skip the wizard (optional)
steps.description:
To use only saved settings with no dialog, set `nestjsCrud.showOptionsWizard` to **false** in User or Workspace settings. Use **Generate CRUD (quick, saved or last custom options)** to skip the wizard but apply your last custom run or workspace defaults.
[Open settings.json](command:workbench.action.openSettingsJson)

nestjsCrud.addSwagger.description: Add Swagger/OpenAPI decorators to generated DTOs and controllers.

nestjsCrud.showOptionsWizard.description: When true, the Generate command shows a step-by-step options dialog before writing files. When false, uses only the other nestjsCrud.* settings (no dialog).

nestjsCrud.autoRegisterModule.description: Register generated controller, service, and TypeOrmModule.forFeature in the nearest *.module.ts (AST-based).

nestjsCrud.routePrefix.description: Prefix for the controller path (e.g. 'api/v1'). Leave empty for no prefix; resource segment comes from the entity table/collection name.

nestjsCrud.useIsEmailForEmailFields.description: For string properties whose name contains "email" (case-insensitive), use @IsEmail() instead of @IsString().

nestjsCrud.useClassValidatorDecorators.description: When true, generated Create DTOs import class-validator (@IsString, @IsNotEmpty, …). Requires class-validator (and class-transformer with ValidationPipe) in the project. When false, only typed properties and optional Swagger decorators are emitted — no class-validator import.

nestjsCrud.dataSource.description: mongodb: MongoRepository + string ids. sql: TypeORM Repository for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, SQLite, and other SQL drivers (same generated code).

nestjsCrud.sqlIdType.description: Primary key type for generated SQL service/controller. auto infers from the entity when possible. Ignored when dataSource is mongodb.

nestjsCrud.primaryKeyField.description: Primary key property name in the entity (used in SQL where clauses).

nestjsCrud.routeStrategy.description: rest: standard REST paths (e.g. POST /, GET /, GET :id, PATCH/PUT :id, DELETE :id). legacy: previous style (AddX, showXs, showX/:id, ...).

nestjsCrud.restUpdateMethod.description: HTTP method for update when routeStrategy is rest. Ignored for legacy.

nestjsCrud.previewMode.description: perFile: open a diff and confirm for each file (safest). batch: one confirmation for all files, no per-file diffs. off: one confirmation, no diffs (fastest; still overwrites with care).

nestjsCrud.trustEntityFileWithoutEntityS.description: When true, do not prompt when the file name is not `*.entity.ts` but the file has `@Entity` (useful for custom naming conventions).

nestjsCrud.generateServiceSpec.description: When true (built-in codegen only), also emit `*.service.spec.ts` with a Jest + mocked repository scaffold. Ignored when `nestjsCrud.templatesPath` is set.

nestjsCrud.includeInheritedEntityPropert.description: When true, DTOs include same-file base class property declarations (TypeScript AST inheritance). Cross-file base classes are not followed.

nestjsCrud.templatesPath.description: Folder with Handlebars files `create-dto.hbs`, `update-dto.hbs`, `service.hbs`, and `controller.hbs` (and optional partials `_*.hbs`). When null or empty, the extension uses its built-in generator. When set, paths can be absolute or relative to the workspace root for the file’s folder.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run test:generated-lint && npm run lint
